title: Environmental Disputes of Tampere 1996-2000
description: The study consists of interviews conducted between 1996 and 2000, in connection with a study on the politicisation of urban environment and the formation of environmental problems in society. The respondents were citizens of Tampere who have a long experience in working with environmental issues. Topics included local administration, political culture, environmental activity, and environmental problems and disputes specific to Tampere.
